title: qrafty's Capitalized Font
description: This pack replaces lowercase letters with a smaller version of the capitalized letters, as seen on some servers. 🫐
body:
# Ever seen this capitalized font on servers and thought: 'Woah, I need that?' 👀

## Now you've got it! 🫐

All of the lowercase letters are replaced with their uppercase letters but one pixel smaller. Numbers and some special characters are also edited to better match the average height of the texts.

qrafty's Capitalized Font is also availabe for [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/qraftys-capitalized-font-bedrock), ported by [Drqad](https://modrinth.com/user/Drqad)!

Cyrillic letters were made by `@qvartenzi`.

This font is available as an .otf file for content creation! Download it for free on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/post/qraftium-FONT-N4N81DJKV5) 📲

![Image of the new lowercase letters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efd96295617156e126c0175ec4dd66e625e5d2ec.png)
